sections.title: Charts on Demand
items: Ask for a bar, pie, line, or doughnut chart of your fleet data and see it rendered right in the conversation.
Simply describe what you'd like to visualise — the chatbot picks the best chart type and renders it instantly.
Supports all common chart types: bar, pie, line, and doughnut — just ask.

sections.title: Excel Export with Data
items: Every chart comes with a one-click Excel download containing the chart and the source data.
Re-cut the data your way — the export includes the full dataset behind the visualisation, ready for your own analysis.

sections.title: Conversational Follow-ups
items: Change your mind mid-flow — say "now show that as a bar chart", "break it down by country", or "export that" and it keeps the context.
No need to repeat your original question — the chatbot remembers what you asked and adapts on the fly.
Chain multiple refinements naturally: filter, re-chart, and export all within the same conversation.

sections.title: Single Sign-On (SSO)
items: Users can now be seamlessly logged into the chat platform directly from fleetworx.net without needing separate credentials.
Simply click through from fleetworx.net and you will be automatically signed in — no extra login required.
New users are automatically set up on first visit with the correct access level based on their fleetworx.net role.

sections.title: Daily Chat Cleanup
items: Conversations older than 30 days are now automatically cleaned up to keep the platform tidy and performant.
Old and inactive chat threads are removed on a scheduled basis, ensuring a clutter-free experience.

sections.title: Inactivity Auto-Logout
items: Users are automatically logged out after 5 hours of inactivity for improved security.
This ensures unattended sessions do not remain open, protecting sensitive fleet data.

sections.title: Data Export Capabilities
items: The chat bot can now export data tables as CSV or Excel files for easy downloading.
When presented with a table of data, the bot will proactively ask if you would like to export it as a CSV or Excel file.

You can request a download directly in your original message (e.g., 'collate all costs for Pfizer UK for 2025 and download this as a csv file') to receive the file immediately without additional prompts.

sections.title: Custom Column Exports
items: When confirming an export, you can dynamically request additional data columns to be included in the file (e.g., 'yes, but please add the vehicle model column').
The chat bot will generate the file download incorporating the exact additional columns you requested.

sections.title: Search & Data Accuracy
items: Improved country search accuracy by defaulting to active vehicles (is_archived = 0) for fleet summaries.
Enhanced spend analysis logic to better handle country-specific filtering via vehicle registration and currency mapping.
Improved first-time query understanding for location variations (e.g. "UK" → "United Kingdom").

sections.title: Localization & Formatting
items: Enforced UK date formatting and English (UK) spelling across all system responses.
Improved supplier identification logic to reliably match both supplier names and codes.

sections.title: Entity Mapping Fixes
items: Fixed supplier classification (e.g. Driv01) to ensure accurate data filtering in follow-up queries.

sections.title: Long-Term Memory — Admin Controlled
items: Admins can now create and manage persistent memory rules that apply across all conversations for every member in the organisation.
Memory rules are injected as context into every new or ongoing conversation, ensuring the AI agent always has relevant organisational knowledge.
Role-based access control ensures only Admin users can create and manage memory entries.

sections.title: How to Add Memory Manually
items: Open the right-side panel in chat.fleetworx.net and navigate to the Memory section.
Tap the + button to create a new memory entry.
Each entry has a Key (for identification, e.g. fleetworx_info, fleetworx_rules, fleetworx_client_summary) and a Value (the information to store).
Saved entries are immediately available to the AI agent as persistent context.

sections.title: How to Add Memory Automatically
items: Simply type "Please remember..." or "Please save..." in any conversation.
The agent will automatically extract the key and information and save it as a memory entry.
No manual panel interaction required — memory is built conversationally.

sections.title: Text-to-SQL Query Load Management
items: This enhancement ensures system stability when handling large datasets.
If a generated query results in excessive data or exceeds processing limits, the agent will gracefully terminate the execution and prompt the user to narrow the date range or refine the query.

sections.title: What's New
items: Deployed the "Fleetworx AI Dev" agent to the live "Fleetworx AI" environment. The Fleetworx team no longer needs to switch to the Dev agent.
Short-term memory implementation – You can now ask follow-up questions within the same chat thread, and the agent will retain the conversation context.

Improved date and time-based calculations – For example, if you ask "Provide the cost summary of last month," the agent will automatically calculate the correct date range. The same logic applies to queries such as last week, last 3 months, etc.

sections.title: Initial Release
items: First public release of the Fleetworx AI agent.
Natural language querying for fleet data.
Core Text-to-SQL capabilities for fleet management insights.
